main.description: Records a funding receipt for a payment from one user to another user. It may be recorded by the recipient, by the sender, or by a third party. The sender may remain anonymous.

from.description: The sender of the funds (a free-text string, an account DID, or a strong reference to a record). Optional — omit to represent anonymity.

to.description: The recipient of the funds (a free-text string, an account DID, or a strong reference to a record).

amount.description: Amount of funding received as a numeric string (e.g. '1000.50').

currency.description: Currency of the payment (e.g. EUR, USD, ETH).

paymentRail.description: How the funds were transferred (e.g. bank_transfer, credit_card, onchain, cash, check, payment_processor).

paymentNetwork.description: Optional network within the payment rail (e.g. arbitrum, ethereum, sepa, visa, paypal).

transactionId.description: Identifier of the underlying payment transaction (e.g. bank reference, onchain transaction hash, or processor-specific ID). Use paymentNetwork to specify the network where applicable.

for.description: Optional strong reference to the activity, project, or organization this funding relates to.

notes.description: Optional notes or additional context for this funding receipt.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this receipt record was created.

text.description: A free-text string value (e.g. a display name, wallet address, or other identifier).
